purpose: Retire the foam-strip lighthouse hint and express discovery through real V43 fog occlusion of the existing V44 lighthouse under V74/V76 weather.

ownership.V43: broad far/mid cloud alpha reused as low horizon fog; runtime owns parallax and opacity
ownership.V74: world time/weather grade before beam emission
ownership.V76: rain sprites in RainFront and StormSurge only
ownership.runtime: clue state, fog opacity/offset, lighthouse visibility, beam timing, camera and weather synchronization

visibility_states.note: 宽幅雾存在，但精确灯塔位置没有泡沫条、光点或局部提示
只允许被雾切断的低对比剪影，不提前显示光束
塔体可读，光束作为 V74 后 emission 出现
暴潮压低能见度和光束，但不把已确认方向重新变成提示条

integration_order: render neutral sky, V56 ocean and V43 cloud/fog
render V44 lighthouse body only when clue state permits
render V76 rain for rain/storm states
render V44 beam and lens glow as emission only when lighthouse is known and visibility permits
render UI after the world; never replace visibility with an in-world marker
retire_atomically: 0.9x0.14m foam-strip update at the lighthouse anchor
forbidden: Do not show foam, a cyan bar, glow dot, arrow or local fog puff at the exact unknown lighthouse anchor.
Do not reveal the lighthouse silhouette or beam in UnknownRain.
Do not show the beam during BearingDusk.
Do not bake fog into the V44 lighthouse or beam textures.
Do not copy V43 cloud pixels into V77; reuse the existing V43 renderer/resource.
Do not import V77 QA PNGs into Catalog, Scene or Prefab.
Do not update the authoritative runtime manifest before Unity Game View evidence.
